# Erigon

> Erigon is a high-performance Ethereum execution client known for its efficiency, modularity, and minimal disk footprint. It features an integrated consensus layer (Caplin), BitTorrent-based historical data distribution, and OtterSync for fast node synchronization.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](README.md): Overview of Erigon's core features and architecture
- [Why Erigon?](get-started/readme/why-using-erigon.md): Key advantages over other Ethereum clients
- [Hardware Requirements](get-started/hardware-requirements.md): System requirements for running Erigon
- [Installation](get-started/installation/README.md): How to install Erigon from source or Docker
- [Migrating from Geth](get-started/migrating-from-geth.md): Guide for users switching from go-ethereum

## Running a Node

- [Basic Usage](fundamentals/basic-usage.md): Essential commands and options
- [Sync Modes](fundamentals/sync-modes.md): Full, archive, and minimal sync options
- [CLI Reference](fundamentals/configuring-erigon/README.md): Complete command-line flag reference
- [Supported Networks](fundamentals/supported-networks.md): Ethereum mainnet, testnets, and L2s
- [Docker Compose](fundamentals/docker-compose.md): Running Erigon with Docker

## JSON-RPC API

- [RPC Service Overview](interacting-with-erigon/README.md): How to interact with Erigon via RPC
- [eth namespace](interacting-with-erigon/eth.md): Standard Ethereum JSON-RPC methods
- [erigon namespace](interacting-with-erigon/erigon.md): Erigon-specific RPC methods
- [debug namespace](interacting-with-erigon/debug.md): Debugging and tracing methods
- [trace namespace](interacting-with-erigon/trace.md): OpenEthereum-compatible tracing
- [txpool namespace](interacting-with-erigon/txpool.md): Transaction pool inspection
- [gRPC API](interacting-with-erigon/grpc.md): Low-level gRPC interface for advanced use

## Architecture & Modules

- [Caplin](fundamentals/caplin.md): Integrated consensus layer client
- [RPC Daemon](fundamentals/modules/rpc-daemon.md): Separate RPC service module
- [TxPool](fundamentals/modules/txpool.md): Transaction pool module
- [Sentry](fundamentals/modules/sentry.md): P2P networking module
- [Downloader](fundamentals/modules/downloader.md): BitTorrent-based data downloader

## Staking

- [Staking with Caplin](staking/caplin.md): Using the integrated consensus client as validator
- [External Consensus Client](staking/external-consensus-client-as-validator.md): Using Lighthouse, Prysm, etc.

## Optional

- [Performance Tricks](fundamentals/performance-tricks.md): Optimization tips for production
- [Optimizing Storage](fundamentals/optimizing-storage.md): Reducing disk usage
- [Security](fundamentals/security.md): Security best practices
- [Otterscan](fundamentals/otterscan.md): Block explorer for Erigon
- [Contributing](about/contributing.md): How to contribute to Erigon

## Help & Troubleshooting

- [Help Center](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/README.md): Overview of support resources
- [FAQs](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/frequently-asked-questions-faqs.md): Frequently asked questions
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/troubleshooting.md): Diagnosing common problems
- [Common Errors](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/common-errors-and-solutions.md): Error messages and fixes
- [Known Issues](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/known-issues.md): Current limitations and workarounds
- [Best Practices](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/best-practices.md): Recommended configurations
- [Glossary](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/gitbook-help/glossary-of-key-terms.md): Definitions of key terms

## Developer Internals

- [Programmer's Guide](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/guide.md): Deep dive into Erigon architecture and code
- [Database Walkthrough](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/db_walkthrough.MD): How Erigon stores blockchain data
- [Database FAQ](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/db_faq.md): Common questions about the database layer
- [Dupsort](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/dupsort.md): MDBX dupsort feature usage
- [Witness Format](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/witness_format.md): Block witness serialization format
- [Witness Formal Spec](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/programmers_guide/witness_formal_spec.md): Formal specification of witnesses

## Additional Documentation

- [DEV_CHAIN.md](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/DEV_CHAIN.md): Running a local development chain
- [TESTING.md](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/TESTING.md): How to run tests
- [Mining](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/mining.md): Mining configuration (legacy PoW)
- [EVM Semantics](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/evm_semantics.md): EVM implementation details
- [Merry-go-round Sync](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/merry-go-round-sync.md): Sync algorithm documentation

## Security Audits

- [2017 Geth Audit (Truesec)](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/audits/2017-04-25_Geth-audit_Truesec.pdf)
- [2018 Clef Audit (NCC)](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/audits/2018-09-14_Clef-audit_NCC.pdf)
- [2019 Discv5 Audit (Least Authority)](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/audits/2019-10-15_Discv5_audit_LeastAuthority.pdf)
- [2020 Discv5 Audit (Cure53)](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/blob/release/3.4/docs/audits/2020-01-24_DiscV5_audit_Cure53.pdf)

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon): Main source code repository
- [Releases](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/releases): Download binaries and release notes
- [Docker Hub](https://hub.docker.com/r/erigontech/erigon): Official Docker images
